message:
feat(abi): implement native posix_spawn family via fork+exec, replacing glibc callthrough

Replace the glibc-callthrough posix_spawn implementation with a fully native
version using fork()+execve()/execvp() with proper file action and spawn
attribute handling:

Core implementation (process_abi.rs):
- SpawnFileAction enum: Close, Dup2, Open variants for child-side fd setup
- SpawnFileActions/SpawnAttrs structs with magic-tagged opaque pointer storage
  (SPAWN_FA_MAGIC/SPAWN_AT_MAGIC) matching glibc's posix_spawn_file_actions_t
  and posix_spawnattr_t layout
- posix_spawn_file_actions_init/destroy: heap-allocate and tag the opaque
  struct, with magic validation on destroy to prevent double-free
- posix_spawn_file_actions_addclose/adddup2/addopen: append file actions to
  the internal vector
- posix_spawnattr_init/destroy: same pattern for spawn attributes
- posix_spawnattr_setflags/getflags/setpgroup/getpgroup: attribute accessors
- posix_spawn: fork(), apply file actions in child (close/dup2/open), apply
  spawn attributes (POSIX_SPAWN_SETPGROUP, POSIX_SPAWN_SETSIGDEF,
  POSIX_SPAWN_SETSIGMASK), then execve(); parent waitpid-free via SIGCHLD
- posix_spawnp: same but uses execvp for PATH-based lookup
- apply_file_actions/apply_spawn_attrs helper functions for child-side setup

This eliminates 8 GlibcCallThrough symbols (posix_spawn, posix_spawnp,
posix_spawn_file_actions_init/destroy/addclose/adddup2/addopen,
posix_spawnattr_init/destroy/setflags/getflags/setpgroup/getpgroup).

Also updates version script (libc.map) with new exports and refreshes
support_matrix.json with current symbol counts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
